descriptions.description: The 92N6E Grave Stone is a multi-function radar serving as the primary fire-control and engagement radar for the S-400 air-defense system. Designed and manufactured by Almaz-Antey, the 92N6E provides simultaneous search, track, and missile-guidance functions to enable rapid target engagement. The radar operates in conjunction with the 91N6E panoramic radar, receiving pre-screened target data and refining tracks for handoff to the missile-guidance channels. Its X- and L-band phased-array architecture delivers the precision required for engagement of maneuvering targets across the entire altitude spectrum.
descriptions.shortDescription: Multi-function fire-control radar providing tracking and missile guidance for the S-400.

descriptions.description: The 92N6E employs separate X-band and L-band antenna elements to provide complementary performance characteristics: X-band delivers fine-resolution target tracking and missile guidance, while L-band provides robust search and track-while-scan capability. The radar uses phased-array beam steering to enable rapid target handoff and continuous missile guidance without mechanical antenna movement. The signal processor integrates automatic target detection, track initiation, and multi-target engagement algorithms to maintain simultaneous engagement channels. The modular design permits integration with the command post and distributed deployment across multiple fire units networked through the S-400 tactical command system.
descriptions.shortDescription: Dual-band phased-array radar with X-band engagement and L-band search capability.
